settings.description: Yokohama's top all-season performer. Ultra-high performance traction from spring through fall with precise steering and confident wet-road grip.
Advanced winter compound with an asymmetric tread pattern. Outstanding performance on black ice and packed snow throughout Calgary winters.
A best-seller for trucks and SUVs. Aggressive enough for off-road trails, comfortable enough for daily highway commuting.
Summer performance tire with exceptional grip and handling precision. Designed for sports cars and enthusiast drivers who demand the best.

settings.subtitle: Yokohama's proprietary rubber compounds deliver precise handling in sport, touring, and winter conditions — all without compromising ride quality or fuel efficiency.
settings.cta_description: In-stock selection available. Same-day installation with professional mounting, balancing, and alignment.
